description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU PIP Installation Test that tests the download and installation of FBGEMM_GPU releases published to PyTorch PyPI. The workflow should trigger on a daily schedule and allow manual dispatch with inputs for PyTorch version, FBGEMM-GPU channel and version, build target, and build variant. For each build variant (cuda, cpu, rocm), set up a test job that installs PyTorch and FBGEMM_GPU from PyPI and runs tests with PyTest.
